sentiment: The smallest whisper, given enough care, can fill a room that all the shouting never reached.

stories.title: Transcribe.cpp
stories.summary: A ggml-based cross-platform speech transcription library supporting all latest models, born from the pain of distributing ASR across systems.

stories.title: Speech Recognition and TTS in less than 500kb
stories.summary: Moonshine Micro runs voice-activity detection, command recognition, and neural speech synthesis on a $0.80 microcontroller in 470KB of RAM.

stories.title: The Kimi K3 Moment
stories.summary: Kimi K3 matches Claude's coding quality at a third the price, proving open models can compete with closed giants on real work.
